scope: Track A audit of live/enrichment source ids referenced by Uniswap and UniswapX manifests

evidence: crates/policy-server/sync/src/sources/fetchers/abi_decoder/types.rs registers decoder id as (uint112,uint112,uint32)
crates/policy-server/sync/src/sources/fetchers/onchain.rs falls back from DecoderRegistry to AbiDecoder for registered ABI decoder ids
Referenced by V2 Router02, SwapRouter02 V2-path, and Universal Router manifests
sources.notes: No ABI args are required for getReserves().

evidence: crates/policy-server/sync/src/sources/fetchers/abi_decoder/types.rs registers decoder id as (uint160,int24,uint16,uint16,uint16,uint8,bool)
crates/policy-server/sync/src/sources/fetchers/abi_decoder/mod.rs has decodes_uniswap_v3_slot0_shape test
Referenced by SwapRouter02, V3 NFPM, and Universal Router manifests
sources.notes: No ABI args are required for slot0().

evidence: Referenced by registryV2/manifests/uniswap/v3-nfpm/collect@1.0.0.json
Referenced by registryV2/manifests/uniswap/v3-nfpm/decrease-liquidity@1.0.0.json
crates/policy-server/sync/src/actions/args.rs encodes the position tokenId for AmmRemoveLiquidityFeesOwed and AmmCollectFeesOwed
crates/policy-server/sync/src/sources/fetchers/onchain.rs decodes Uniswap V3 positions(uint256) token0/token1/tokensOwed0/tokensOwed1 into chain-qualified TokenRef fee rows
cargo test -p simulation-sync uniswap --lib PASS
sources.notes: The decoder is source-id aware because positions(uint256) returns a tuple where only specific slots are needed for owed fee semantics.

evidence: Referenced by registryV2/manifests/uniswap/permit2/permitSingle@1.0.0.json and permitBatch@1.0.0.json
Referenced by Universal Router Permit2 nested commands
crates/policy-server/sync/src/actions/args.rs encodes owner plus signed nonce word for TokenPermit2SignNonce
crates/policy-server/sync/src/sources/fetchers/decoder.rs registers permit2_nonce_bitmap as a raw U256 string decoder
crates/policy-server/sync/src/runtime/orchestrator.rs checks the fetched bitmap bit and only applies the signed (word, bit) nonce coordinate when the bit is unused
crates/policy-server/sync/src/actions/walk/token.rs rejects raw bitmap strings so bitmap words are not silently treated as coordinates
cargo test -p simulation-sync args:: --lib PASS
sources.notes: The live source remains nonceBitmap(address,uint256), but reducer state stores the signed nonce coordinate after orchestrator-level freshness validation.

evidence: Referenced by registryV2/manifests/uniswapx/*.json and Uniswap swap/universal-router quote live inputs
crates/policy-server/sync/src/manifests/v2/parser.rs can parse the VenueApi source shape
crates/policy-server/sync/src/sources/fetchers/venue/uniswap.rs implements UniswapFetcher for quote/open-orders parser ids
crates/policy-server/sync/src/runtime/orchestrator.rs dispatches Uniswap venue_api sources to UniswapFetcher while retaining Hyperliquid dispatch
cargo test -p simulation-sync uniswap --lib PASS
sources.notes: Fetcher parser coverage includes swap expected amount out, UniswapX expected fill price, and competing open order count response shapes.
